title: Oscars Predictions via Feinberg Forecast: Scott's Final Picks
text: Scott Feinberg's forecasts project the following order of finish for Best Director: 1. Paul Thomas Anderson for "One Battle After Another" (Warner Bros.), 2. Ryan Coogler for "Sinners" (Warner Bros.), 3. Chloé Zhao for "Hamnet" (Focus), 4. Joachim Trier for "Sentimental Value" (Neon), 5. Josh Safdie for "Marty Supreme" (A24). Feinberg notes that while "Sinners" has "late-breaking momentum," statistical evidence continues pointing to Anderson as the likely winner. He emphasizes his predictions are "based on facts, not feelings," observing that precursor awards traditionally signal Oscar outcomes. "No film has ever lost with the extensive portfolio of precursors that "One Battle" has collected," supporting Anderson's projected win in this category.
